title: CVE-2026-62207: OpenClaw Auth Bypass
summary: [P1] OpenClaw versions before 2026.6.5 contain an authentication bypass vulnerability, and no patch is currently available. This vulnerability allows attackers to bypass authentication entirely, gaining unauthorized access to the system. Why now: The vulnerability is highly exploitable and has a significant impact on the system's security. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability allows attackers to bypass authentication, which is a clear indication of an authentication bypass problem type.

title: CVE-2026-62208: OpenClaw Authorization Header Forwarding
summary: [P1] OpenClaw before 2026.6.5 could forward Authorization headers during MCP SSE redirection, allowing attackers to gain unauthorized access to the system.
